Bash(python -c "import django; import os; os.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE']='jlpt_neuro_master.settings'; django.setup\(\); from apps.flashcards.serializers import CardSerializer; s = CardSerializer\(\); ro = [f for f in s.fields if s.fields[f].read_only]; rw = [f for f in ['furigana','image','audio'] if not s.fields[f].read_only]; print\('read-only:', ro\); print\('writable new:', rw\)")
